description:
Teleport Connect provides easy and secure access to SSH servers, databases, applications, Windows desktops, and Kubernetes clusters.


- Fix CRL publication for Active Directory Windows desktop access. #57264
- Allow YubiKeys running 5.7.4+ firmware to be usable as PIV hardware keys. #57216
- Append headers to configuration files generated by teleport-update. #56577
Enterprise:
- Fixed application crash that could occur when using GitHub personal access tokens that don't have an expiration date
